name: StepFunction

members.name: StepFunction
members.javadoc:
/** * Builds a step function from a list of arguments and the corresponding * values. Specifically, returns the function h(x) defined by 

 * h(x) = y[0] for all x < x[1]
 *        y[1] for x[1] ≤ x < x[2]
 *        ...
 *        y[y.length - 1] for x ≥ x[x.length - 1]
 *
* The value of {@code x[0]} is ignored, but it must be strictly less than * {@code x[1]}. * * @param x Domain values where the function changes value. * @param y Values of the function. * @throws NonMonotonicSequenceException * if the {@code x} array is not sorted in strictly increasing order. * @throws NullArgumentException if {@code x} or {@code y} are {@code null}. * @throws NoDataException if {@code x} or {@code y} are zero-length. * @throws DimensionMismatchException if {@code x} and {@code y} do not * have the same length. */

tags.name: x
tags.content: Domain values where the function changes value.
tags.description: Domain values where the function changes value.

tags.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
tags.content: if the {@code x} array is not sorted in strictly increasing order.
tags.assertion: assert x[0] < x[1] && java.util.Arrays.stream(Arrays.copyOfRange(x, 1, x.length - 1)).allMatch(p -> p < x[x.length - 1]);
tags.description: if the x array is not sorted in strictly increasing order.

tags.name: NullArgumentException
tags.content: if {@code x} or {@code y} are {@code null}.
tags.description: if x or y are null.

tags.name: NoDataException
tags.content: if {@code x} or {@code y} are zero-length.
tags.description: if x or y are zero-length.

tags.name: DimensionMismatchException
tags.content:
if {@code x} and {@code y} do not
have the same length.
tags.description: if x and y do not have the same length.
